title: Mrslinda
compiled_truth: Mrslinda is an external contact at [Lplpi](companies/lplpi). Over the corpus period (1999-08-15 to 2002-01-18), Mrslinda sent 26 and received 46 emails, totalling 72 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (18), [Beau](people/beau-layfam) (12), [Heather](people/heather-layfam) (7), [Ealvittor](people/ealvittor-yahoo) (7), [Mark Lay](people/mark-lay-solutioncompany) (7).
